creator: Meyser+bugs.freebsd.org@xenet.de
text:
fixed port for lang/eperl

All patches are taken from WML Metalanguages (same author as eperl)
internal enhanced eperl version.

This schould fix the reported CVE Vulnerability.
Make it compile with threaded perl.

I added STAGEDIR support.
